message:
feat(web): add Server-Sent Events (SSE) support and stub out websocket module

Introduce a new web::sse module implementing the SSE protocol
(text/event-stream) with SseEvent builder, multi-line data handling,
null-byte ID rejection, keep-alive comments, and last-event-id
reconnection support. Both SseEvent and Sse implement IntoResponse
for direct use as handler return types. Includes comprehensive test
coverage (~25 tests) for serialization, response headers, and
realistic usage patterns.

The websocket module is temporarily stubbed to a single-line placeholder
as part of an ongoing reorganization (full implementation preserved
externally). The pub mod sse declaration is added to web/mod.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
